title: Runtime shader / PSO compilation
symptoms: first-time shader or pipeline state object compile stalls the frame
hitch the first time a new material or effect is shown
compile spike not seen on subsequent frames
mechanism: A shader or graphics pipeline state object is compiled on demand the first time it is needed, and the compile runs on the frame thread, causing a one-off hitch.
diagnosis_hints: Check whether the spike is a shader/PSO compile and whether it happens only on first appearance of a material or effect.
typical_fixes: precompile shaders / PSOs at load or during a warm-up pass
use a PSO cache and prime it with representative draws
render new effects once off-screen during loading
